sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71538" key="cenopa/qeia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξενο-πάθεια</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[πᾰ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n71538.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strange feelings, malaise,</tr_> Sor.I.III, al.</sense> </entryFree>
